productDisplayName: Puma Men Iridium II Rubber White Sports Shoes
description: Premium high performance batting and bowling shoe, ideally suited to indoor and synthetic surfaces, this Iridium 11 Rubber shoe from puma is a must have - be it for sport or casual wear. Upper Lightweight air mesh upper with synthetic overlays for breathability and structure Cushioned collar and tongue for extra comfort Form stripe on the side for added structure Perforations on the toe box for breathability Brand logo embroidered on the side Central lacing for a snug and customised Fit Outsole extended to the toe box Midsole Soft, cushioned midsole for all-day comfort iCELL cushioning unit in the heel Unique dual density M2D moulded EVA midsole technology that improves motion control and cushioning Outsole Anti-torsion ArchTech stability shank EverTrack rubber outsole with moulded forefoot and heel cleat detail Extensively wear tested by puma professional players in UK and Australia Lightweight performance without sacrificing support and stability Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
